raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red drum with a white drumhead is on a table. A person is seated at a desk in the background. The drum is rigid with a circular drumhead. STRATEGY - To play the drum, strike the drumhead. The task requires reaching the drum, grasping it for stability, and then striking the drumhead. Failure modes include missing the drumhead or not striking with enough force. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drum body; Step 2 grasp the drum body for stability; Step 3 strike the drumhead.
Goal: struck(red_drum)
Scene: red_drum, table, person
Step 1: reach(red_drum)
  affordance_region: the body of the red drum
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_drum, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_drum) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_drum)
  affordance_region: the body of the red drum
  contact: holding(red_drum) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_drum)
Step 3: strike(red_drum)
  affordance_region: the drumhead of the red drum
  contact: surface_contact(gripper, drumhead) [completion]
  pose: gripper_pose(over_drumhead) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(gripper, drumhead)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red drum
the body of the red drum
the drumhead of the red drum
